description: Bare HTTP GET requests consistently return a 200 OK status but the response body contains a captcha/verification challenge instead of the expected profile data or embedded JSON state.
mitigation: Migrated TikTok to PlaywrightCrawler to natively solve/bypass SSR Captcha blocks by rendering the page.

description: Bare HTTP requests and Apify residential proxies both fail to hit SSR HTML containing SIGI_STATE or __UNIVERSAL_DATA_FOR_REHYDRATION__.
mitigation: Migrated TikTok to PlaywrightCrawler to natively solve/bypass SSR Captcha blocks by rendering the page.

description: High likelihood of HTTP 403 Forbidden when accessing YouTube from Datacenter IPs without rendering JavaScript or having residential reputation
mitigation: CheerioCrawler residential proxy mapping + injected CONSENT cookie in preNavigationHooks

description: Redirects or blocks via consent.youtube.com for European IPs or unconsented automated sessions
mitigation: CheerioCrawler residential proxy mapping + injected CONSENT cookie in preNavigationHooks

description: LinkedIn returns HTTP 999 for bare HTTP requests without proper headers or browser fingerprinting, indicating a strict anti-bot challenge wall.
mitigation: Injected session tokens (li_at, JSESSIONID) via PlaywrightCrawler preNavigationHooks.

description: Reddit API enforces rate limiting via x-ratelimit-* headers: 100 requests per 600-second window. Exceeding the limit returns HTTP 429.
mitigation: CheerioCrawler with SessionPool handles retry on HTTP 429.

description: Google Maps returns a Consent wall in EU regions or an "Unusual traffic from your computer network" CAPTCHA screen.
mitigation: Use PlaywrightCrawler with residential proxies and human-like delays. Implement detectBlock() to catch CAPTCHA or unusual traffic strings.

description: Mandatory login wall detected on profile pages.
mitigation: Injected session cookies via PlaywrightCrawler preNavigationHooks. Implemented detectBlock() to fail-fast on login walls.

description: Mandatory login wall detected on profile pages.
mitigation: Injected session cookies via PlaywrightCrawler preNavigationHooks. Implemented detectBlock() to fail-fast on login walls.

description: WAF challenges (Cloudflare/DataDome) detected on business websites.
mitigation: PlaywrightCrawler with stealth settings and residential proxies. Implemented detectBlock() to capture WAF HTML for manual review.
